exercises.title: Understanding HTTP Fundamentals
exercises.description: Review the concepts in this lesson and explain HTTP Fundamentals in your own words. Write down the key points and how they connect to what you already know.

solution.code:
Key points about HTTP Fundamentals:
1. Requests, responses, headers, methods, and status codes.
2. Core concept: Understanding the fundamentals
3. Application: Use in real projects

exercises.title: Hands-on Practice: HTTP Fundamentals
exercises.description: Apply what you learned about HTTP Fundamentals in a practical exercise. Start with the basics and build up to more complex implementations.

solution.code:
Practice steps:
1. Set up your environment
2. Implement the basic version
3. Add advanced features
4. Test and debug
5. Refactor and optimize

exercises.title: Challenge: HTTP Fundamentals Mastery
exercises.description: Push your understanding of HTTP Fundamentals by tackling a more complex scenario. This exercise combines multiple concepts from this lesson.
hints: Review all sections of the lesson
Break the problem into smaller parts
Use the code examples as a starting point

solution.code:
Challenge approach:
1. Analyze the requirements
2. Design your solution
3. Implement step by step
4. Test edge cases
5. Document your approach
